title: Jamaican Bao Bites
description: Indulge in these crispy, flavorful bao bites filled with a spicy Jamaican-inspired filling.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F.
Cut bao dough into small pieces and roll out each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add a small amount of oil.
Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the onions, bell peppers, potatoes, and jerk seasoning to the pan and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the flour to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the egg to the pan and stir to combine.
Roll out the bao dough into small balls and flatten each ball into a disk.
Place a tablespoon of the beef and vegetable mixture onto the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the bao bite.
Heat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F and fry the bao bites until golden brown.
Drain the bao bites on paper towels and serve hot.
